name: Cheelai | Help Her Out
description:
Get your filthy hand off me!

Cheelai just recruited you to the Frieza Force after rescuing you from Vampa, now at the canteen some guy is hitting on her, she's clearly uncomfortable, what are you gonna do about it?

art by: @amptami1

CREATOR NOTES:

This is an altered version of the movie plot except for some changes, you're pretty much Broly, Paragus doesn't exist, and neither does Lemo, Cheelai has the shock collar remote instead, and I'm sure there's some stuff I forgot. Sorry I haven't uploaded in a while I was too tired to work on bots. I now qualify to get verified and I sent in a request to be verified, thank you guys so much for the support, hopefully I get it soon.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

UPCOMING BOTS:

The request that will be made this time around is a firekeeper bot, a rockstar ranni au, a quanxi bot (wlw), and a goodbye eri bot. This one actually is guaranteed and I will be making it next before the requests, I saw another creator using art from this artist and I really liked their art.

I found the doujin associated with this one but I won't include some of the stuff cause it's weird. art by @Karasu_Chan1204

something with this maybe?
